SELECT s.Name AS stadium_name, COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count
FROM stadium s
LEFT JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name
ORDER BY concert_count DESC;
